   265โ    def _collect_keys(self):

import sys, os, threading, tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, filedialog, messagebox, scrolledtext

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
from config import ASR_PROVIDERS, LLM_PROVIDERS, load_config, save_config, is_valid
from transcribe import transcribe_audio, test_asr
from compare import compare_texts, test_llm
from docx_util import parse_docx, generate_diff_docx

class App(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('ๅฝ้ณๆๆกฃๅฏนๆฏ')
        self.geometry('700x600')
        self.configure(bg='#f5f5f5')
        self.audio_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.doc_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value='ๅฐฑ็ปช')
        self._build_notebook()

    def _build_notebook(self):
        self.nb = ttk.Notebook(self)
        self.nb.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=8, pady=8)
        self._build_home_tab()
        self._build_result_tab()
        self._build_settings_tab()

    # ===== Home Tab =====
    def _build_home_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=20)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  ้ฆ้กต  ')

        ttk.Label(f, text='้ๆฉๆไปถ', font=('', 16, 'bold')).pack(pady=(0,16))

        bf1 = ttk.Frame(f)
        bf1.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        ttk.Button(bf1, text='๐ค ้ๆฉๅฝ้ณๆไปถ', command=self._pick_audio).pack(side='left')
        ttk.Label(bf1, textvariable=self.audio_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)

        bf2 = ttk.Frame(f)
        bf2.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        ttk.Button(bf2, text='๐ ้ๆฉWordๆๆกฃ', command=self._pick_doc).pack(side='left')
        ttk.Label(bf2, textvariable=self.doc_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)

        self.start_btn = ttk.Button(f, text='ๅผๅงๅฏนๆฏ', command=self._start_compare)
        self.start_btn.pack(pady=20)

        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(f, mode='indeterminate', length=400)
        self.progress.pack(pady=4)

        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.status_var, foreground='#666').pack(pady=4)

    def _pick_audio(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='้ๆฉๅฝ้ณๆไปถ',
            filetypes=[('้ณ้ขๆไปถ', '*.wav *.mp3 *.m4a *.flac *.ogg *.wma *.aac'), ('ๆๆๆไปถ', '*.*')])
        if p: self.audio_path.set(p)

    def _pick_doc(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='้ๆฉWordๆๆกฃ',
            filetypes=[('Wordๆๆกฃ', '*.docx'), ('ๆๆๆไปถ', '*.*')])
        if p: self.doc_path.set(p)

    def _start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path.get() or not self.doc_path.get():
            messagebox.showwarning('ๆ็คบ', '่ฏทๅ้ๆฉๅฝ้ณๅWordๆๆกฃ')
            return
        config = load_config()
        if not is_valid(config):
            messagebox.showwarning('ๆ็คบ', '่ฏทๅๅจ่ฎพ็ฝฎไธญ้็ฝฎAPIๅฏ้ฅ')
            self.nb.select(2)
            return
        self.start_btn.config(state='disabled')
        self.progress.start(10)
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, args=(config,), daemon=True).start()

    def _do_compare(self, config):
        try:
            def cb(msg): self.status_var.set(msg)

            cb(f'ๆญฃๅจ่ฝฌๅๅฝ้ณ ({ASR_PROVIDERS[config["asr_provider"]]["name"]})...')
            audio_text = transcribe_audio(self.audio_path.get(), config, cb)

            cb('ๆญฃๅจ่งฃๆๆๆกฃ...')
            paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path.get())
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            cb(f'ๆญฃๅจๅฏนๆฏๅๅฎน ({LLM_PROVIDERS[config["llm_provider"]]["name"]})...')
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config)

            cb('ๆญฃๅจ็ๆๅฏนๆฏๆๆกฃ...')
            output_path = generate_diff_docx(self.doc_path.get(), result.get('diffs', []))

            self.after(0, lambda: self._show_result(output_path, result, audio_text, doc_text))
        except Exception as e:
            self.after(0, lambda: messagebox.showerror('ๅค็ๅคฑ่ดฅ', str(e)))
        finally:
            self.after(0, self._reset_home)

    def _reset_home(self):
        self.progress.stop()
        self.start_btn.config(state='normal')
        self.status_var.set('ๅฐฑ็ปช')

    # ===== Result Tab =====
    def _build_result_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=16)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  ็ปๆ  ')
        self.result_frame = f

        self.diff_count_var = tk.StringVar(value='ๅฐๆชๅฏนๆฏ')
        self.summary_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.output_path_var = tk.StringVar()

        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.diff_count_var, font=('', 14, 'bold'), foreground='#e53935').pack(pady=(0,8))
        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.summary_var, wraplength=600, foreground='#666').pack(pady=(0,12))

        pw = ttk.PanedWindow(f, orient='horizontal')
        pw.pack(fill='both', expand=True)

        lf = ttk.LabelFrame(pw, text='ๅฝ้ณ่ฝฌๅ')
        self.audio_text_box = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(lf, wrap='word', width=35, height=18, font=('', 10))
        self.audio_text_box.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=4, pady=4)
        pw.add(lf, weight=1)

        rf = ttk.LabelFrame(pw, text='ๆๆกฃๅๆ')
        self.doc_text_box = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(rf, wrap='word', width=35, height=18, font=('', 10))
        self.doc_text_box.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=4, pady=4)
        pw.add(rf, weight=1)

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(f)
        btn_f.pack(pady=12)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆๅผๅฏนๆฏๆๆกฃ', command=self._open_result).pack(side='left', padx=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆๅผๆๅจๆไปถๅคน', command=self._open_result_folder).pack(side='left', padx=4)

    def _show_result(self, output_path, result, audio_text, doc_text):
        diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
        self.diff_count_var.set(f'ๅ็ฐ {len(diffs)} ๅคๅทฎๅผ')
        self.summary_var.set(result.get('summary', ''))
        self.output_path_var.set(output_path)

        self.audio_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
        self.audio_text_box.insert('1.0', audio_text)
        self.doc_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
        self.doc_text_box.insert('1.0', doc_text)

        self.nb.select(1)

    def _open_result(self):
        p = self.output_path_var.get()
        if p and os.path.exists(p):
            os.startfile(p)

    def _open_result_folder(self):
        p = self.output_path_var.get()
        if p and os.path.exists(p):
            os.startfile(os.path.dirname(p))

    # ===== Settings Tab =====
    def _build_settings_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=12)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  ่ฎพ็ฝฎ  ')

        canvas = tk.Canvas(f, bg='#f5f5f5', highlightthickness=0)
        scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(f, orient='vertical', command=canvas.yview)
        self.settings_inner = ttk.Frame(canvas)
        self.settings_inner.bind('<Configure>', lambda e: canvas.configure(scrollregion=canvas.bbox('all')))
        canvas.create_window((0, 0), window=self.settings_inner, anchor='nw')
        canvas.configure(yscrollcommand=scrollbar.set)
        canvas.pack(side='left', fill='both', expand=True)
        scrollbar.pack(side='right', fill='y')
        # Mouse wheel scroll
        canvas.bind_all('<MouseWheel>', lambda e: canvas.yview_scroll(-1*(e.delta//120), 'units'))

        sf = self.settings_inner
        self.config_data = load_config()
        self.asr_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data['asr_provider'])
        self.llm_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data['llm_provider'])
        self.key_entries = {}

        # ASR section
        ttk.Label(sf, text='่ฏญ้ณ่ฝฌๅๆๅก', font=('', 14, 'bold')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(8,4))
        asr_f = ttk.Frame(sf)
        asr_f.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        for pid, info in ASR_PROVIDERS.items():
            ttk.Radiobutton(asr_f, text=info['name'], variable=self.asr_var, value=pid,
                command=self._on_asr_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        self.asr_keys_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(sf, text='่ฝฌๅๆๅก้็ฝฎ', padding=8)
        self.asr_keys_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        self._render_asr_keys()

        # LLM section
        ttk.Label(sf, text='ๅคงๆจกๅ๏ผ่ฏญไนๅฏนๆฏ๏ผ', font=('', 14, 'bold')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(16,4))

        ttk.Label(sf, text='ๅฝๅ', font=('', 11)).pack(anchor='w')
        llm_cn = ttk.Frame(sf)
        llm_cn.pack(fill='x', pady=2)
        for pid, info in LLM_PROVIDERS.items():
            if info['region'] == 'cn':
                ttk.Radiobutton(llm_cn, text=info['name'], variable=self.llm_var, value=pid,
                    command=self._on_llm_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        ttk.Label(sf, text='ๅฝ้', font=('', 11)).pack(anchor='w')
        llm_intl = ttk.Frame(sf)
        llm_intl.pack(fill='x', pady=2)
        for pid, info in LLM_PROVIDERS.items():
            if info['region'] == 'intl':
                ttk.Radiobutton(llm_intl, text=info['name'], variable=self.llm_var, value=pid,
                    command=self._on_llm_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        self.llm_keys_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(sf, text='ๅคงๆจกๅ้็ฝฎ', padding=8)
        self.llm_keys_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        self._render_llm_keys()

        ttk.Button(sf, text='ไฟๅญๆๆ่ฎพ็ฝฎ', command=self._save_settings).pack(pady=16)

    def _render_asr_keys(self):
        for w in self.asr_keys_frame.winfo_children(): w.destroy()
        pid = self.asr_var.get()
        info = ASR_PROVIDERS[pid]
        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})

        for field in info['fields']:
            label_map = {'key': 'API Key / AccessKey ID', 'secret': 'Secret', 'appKey': 'AppKey', 'region': 'Region'}
            ttk.Label(self.asr_keys_frame, text=label_map.get(field, field)).pack(anchor='w')
            e = ttk.Entry(self.asr_keys_frame, width=50, show='*' if field in ('key','secret') else '')
            e.insert(0, keys.get(field, ''))
            e.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
            self.key_entries[f'asr_{pid}_{field}'] = e

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.asr_keys_frame)
        btn_f.pack(pady=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆต่ฏ่ฟๆฅ', command=self._test_asr).pack()

    def _render_llm_keys(self):
        for w in self.llm_keys_frame.winfo_children(): w.destroy()
        pid = self.llm_var.get()
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS[pid]
        keys = self.config_data.get('llm_keys', {}).get(pid, {})

        ttk.Label(self.llm_keys_frame, text='API Key').pack(anchor='w')
        e = ttk.Entry(self.llm_keys_frame, width=50, show='*')
        e.insert(0, keys.get('key', ''))
        e.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
        self.key_entries[f'llm_{pid}_key'] = e

        ttk.Label(self.llm_keys_frame, text=f'ๆจกๅๅ็งฐ๏ผ็็ฉบ็จ้ป่ฎค: {info["default_model"]}๏ผ').pack(anchor='w')
        em = ttk.Entry(self.llm_keys_frame, width=50)
        em.insert(0, keys.get('model', ''))
        em.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
        self.key_entries[f'llm_{pid}_model'] = em

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.llm_keys_frame)
        btn_f.pack(pady=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆต่ฏ่ฟๆฅ', command=self._test_llm).pack()

    def _on_asr_change(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self._render_asr_keys()

    def _on_llm_change(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self._render_llm_keys()

    def _collect_keys(self):
        """Collect current key entries into config_data before switching provider."""
        for k, e in list(self.key_entries.items()):
            try:
                val = e.get()
            except:
                continue
            parts = k.split('_', 2)  # e.g. asr_aliyun_key or llm_zhipu_key
            if parts[0] == 'asr':
                pid, field = parts[1], parts[2]
                self.config_data.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(pid, {})[field] = val
            elif parts[0] == 'llm':
                pid, field = parts[1], parts[2]
                self.config_data.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(pid, {})[field] = val
        self.key_entries.clear()

    def _test_asr(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        pid = self.asr_var.get()
        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
        ok, msg = test_asr(pid, keys)
        messagebox.showinfo('ๆๅ' if ok else 'ๅคฑ่ดฅ', msg)

    def _test_llm(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        pid = self.llm_var.get()
        keys = self.config_data.get('llm_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
        if not keys.get('key'):
            messagebox.showwarning('ๆ็คบ', '่ฏทๅๅกซๅAPI Key')
            return

        def do():
            ok, msg = test_llm(pid, keys.get('key'), keys.get('model'))
            self.after(0, lambda: messagebox.showinfo('ๆๅ' if ok else 'ๅคฑ่ดฅ', msg))

        threading.Thread(target=do, daemon=True).start()

    def _save_settings(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self.config_data['asr_provider'] = self.asr_var.get()
        self.config_data['llm_provider'] = self.llm_var.get()
        save_config(self.config_data)
        messagebox.showinfo('ๆๅ', '่ฎพ็ฝฎๅทฒไฟๅญ')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app = App()
    app.mainloop()

1โimport os, time, copy
     2โfrom docx import Document
     3โfrom docx.shared import Pt, RGBColor
     4โfrom docx.oxml.ns import qn
     5โ
     6โdef parse_docx(filepath):
     7โ    doc = Document(filepath)
     8โ    return [p.text.strip() for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]

    10โdef generate_diff_docx(original_path, diffs, output_dir=None):
    11โ    doc = Document(original_path)
    12โ    if output_dir is None:
    13โ        output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')
    14โ
    15โ    # Build diff index by paragraph position
    16โ    diff_by_pos = {}
    17โ    for d in diffs:
    18โ        pos = d.get('position', 0)
    19โ        diff_by_pos.setdefault(pos, []).append(d)
    20โ
    21โ    # Map non-empty paragraphs to their index
    22โ    para_map = []
    23โ    for p in doc.paragraphs:
    24โ        if p.text.strip():
    25โ            para_map.append(p)
    26โ
    27โ    # Insert red annotations after diffed paragraphs (reverse order to preserve indices)
    28โ    for idx in sorted(diff_by_pos.keys(), reverse=True):
    29โ        if idx >= len(para_map):
    30โ            continue
    31โ        target_para = para_map[idx]
    32โ        for d in reversed(diff_by_pos[idx]):
    33โ            dtype = d.get('type', 'mismatch')
    34โ            if dtype == 'mismatch':
    35โ                label = f'ใๅทฎๅผใๆๆกฃ: "{d.get("docText","")}" โ ๅฝ้ณ: "{d.get("audioText","")}"'
    36โ            elif dtype == 'missing_in_audio':
    37โ                label = f'ใๅฝ้ณ็ผบๅคฑใ"{d.get("docText","")}"'
    38โ            else:
    39โ                label = f'ใๅฝ้ณๅคๅบใ"{d.get("audioText","")}"'
    40โ
    41โ            # Insert new paragraph after target
    42โ            new_p = copy.deepcopy(target_para._element)
    43โ            new_p.clear()
    44โ            # Create run with red bold text
    45โ            r_elem = new_p.makeelement(qn('w:r'), {})
    46โ            rpr = r_elem.makeelement(qn('w:rPr'), {})
    47โ            color = rpr.makeelement(qn('w:color'), {qn('w:val'): 'FF0000'})
    48โ            bold = rpr.makeelement(qn('w:b'), {})
    49โ            rpr.append(color)
    50โ            rpr.append(bold)
    51โ            r_elem.append(rpr)
    52โ            t_elem = r_elem.makeelement(qn('w:t'), {})
    53โ            t_elem.text = label
    54โ            t_elem.set(qn('xml:space'), 'preserve')
    55โ            r_elem.append(t_elem)
    56โ            new_p.append(r_elem)
    57โ
    58โ            target_para._element.addnext(new_p)
    59โ
    60โ    ts = time.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
    61โ    output_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f'ๅฏนๆฏ็ปๆ_{ts}.docx')
    62โ    doc.save(output_path)
    63โ    return output_path
    64โ

import os, time, copy
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Pt, RGBColor
from docx.oxml.ns import qn

def parse_docx(filepath):
    doc = Document(filepath)
    return [p.text.strip() for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]

def generate_diff_docx(original_path, diffs, output_dir=None):
    doc = Document(original_path)
    if output_dir is None:
        output_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')

    # Build diff index by paragraph position
    diff_by_pos = {}
    for d in diffs:
        pos = d.get('position', 0)
        diff_by_pos.setdefault(pos, []).append(d)

    # Map non-empty paragraphs to their index
    para_map = []
    for p in doc.paragraphs:
        if p.text.strip():
            para_map.append(p)

    # Insert red annotations after diffed paragraphs (reverse order to preserve indices)
    for idx in sorted(diff_by_pos.keys(), reverse=True):
        if idx >= len(para_map):
            continue
        target_para = para_map[idx]
        for d in reversed(diff_by_pos[idx]):
            dtype = d.get('type', 'mismatch')
            if dtype == 'mismatch':
                label = f'ใๅทฎๅผใๆๆกฃ: "{d.get("docText","")}" โ ๅฝ้ณ: "{d.get("audioText","")}"'
            elif dtype == 'missing_in_audio':
                label = f'ใๅฝ้ณ็ผบๅคฑใ"{d.get("docText","")}"'
            else:
                label = f'ใๅฝ้ณๅคๅบใ"{d.get("audioText","")}"'

            # Insert new paragraph after target
            new_p = copy.deepcopy(target_para._element)
            new_p.clear()
            # Create run with red bold text
            r_elem = new_p.makeelement(qn('w:r'), {})
            rpr = r_elem.makeelement(qn('w:rPr'), {})
            color = rpr.makeelement(qn('w:color'), {qn('w:val'): 'FF0000'})
            bold = rpr.makeelement(qn('w:b'), {})
            rpr.append(color)
            rpr.append(bold)
            r_elem.append(rpr)
            t_elem = r_elem.makeelement(qn('w:t'), {})
            t_elem.text = label
            t_elem.set(qn('xml:space'), 'preserve')
            r_elem.append(t_elem)
            new_p.append(r_elem)

            target_para._element.addnext(new_p)

    ts = time.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
    output_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f'ๅฏนๆฏ็ปๆ_{ts}.docx')
    doc.save(output_path)
    return output_path

content.text:
The project already has a fairly complete Python desktop app with tkinter GUI. The plan originally called for a React Native APK, but it looks like the direction shifted to a Python desktop app โ which is already built with:

- `main.py` โ tkinter GUI with tabs (Home, Result, Settings)
- `transcribe.py` โ FunASR local + Aliyun + OpenAI Whisper support
- `compare.py` โ LLM-based semantic comparison (supports 8 providers)
- `docx_util.py` โ Word parsing and diff-highlighted Word generation
- `config.py` โ multi-provider config management
- `build.py` โ PyInstaller packaging

The app looks functionally complete. You mentioned "FunASRๆๅกๆชๅฏๅจ" โ that's the expected error when FunASR isn't running. Let me start the FunASR server for you.

content.text:
The issue is that the app uses FunASR as the default ASR provider, and it calls `http://localhost:8765/transcribe` โ but the FunASR server isn't running when the user launches the exe.

The app should handle this more gracefully. But first, let me understand the actual problem โ when you run the exe, you get the "FunASRๆๅกๆชๅฏๅจ" error when trying to do a comparison. 

There are a few approaches:
1. Auto-start the FunASR server from within the app
2. Switch to a cloud ASR provider that doesn't need a local server
3. Bundle FunASR directly into the app

Since the app is meant to be a standalone exe, option 1 makes the most sense โ have the app automatically start the FunASR server when needed. Let me update `transcribe.py` to auto-launch the server.

   279โdef format_timestamp(ms: int) -> str:
   280โ    """ๅฐๆฏซ็ง่ฝฌๆขไธบๆถ้ดๆณๆ ผๅผ
   281โ
   282โ    ่งๅ๏ผ
   283โ    - ๅฆๆๆๅฐๆถ๏ผไฝฟ็จ HH:MM:SS ๆ ผๅผ
   284โ    - ๅฆๅไฝฟ็จ MM:SS ๆ ผๅผ๏ผๅ่ๆไปถไธญ็ๆ ผๅผ๏ผ
   285โ    """
   286โ    seconds = ms // 1000
   287โ    hours = seconds // 3600
   288โ    minutes = (seconds % 3600) // 60
   289โ    secs = seconds % 60
   290โ
   291โ    if hours > 0:
   292โ        # ๆๅฐๆถๆถๆพ็คบ HH:MM:SS
   293โ        return f"{hours:02d}:{minutes:02d}:{secs:02d}"
   294โ    else:
   295โ        # ๅฆๅๆพ็คบ MM:SS
   296โ        return f"{minutes:02d}:{secs:02d}"
   297โ
   298โ
   299โdef split_text_by_sentences(text: str) -> list:
   300โ    """ๆๅฅๅญๅๅฒๆๆฌ๏ผไฟ็ๅ้็ฌฆ๏ผ"""
   301โ    import re
   302โ    # ๅน้ๅฅๅญ็ปๆ็ฌฆ๏ผใ๏ผ๏ผ๏ผไปฅๅๅฏ้็ๅผๅทๅ็ฉบๆ ผ
   303โ    # ๆ ผๅผ๏ผ้็ปๆ็ฌฆๅๅฎน + ็ปๆ็ฌฆ + ๅฏ้ๅผๅท + ๅฏ้็ฉบๆ ผ
   304โ    pattern = r'[^ใ๏ผ๏ผ\n]+[ใ๏ผ๏ผ][ใใ""\"]?\s*'
   305โ    sentences = re.findall(pattern, text)
   306โ    # ่ฟๆปค็ฉบๅญ็ฌฆไธฒๅนถๆธ็็ฉบ็ฝ๏ผๅๆถๅค็ๆฒกๆ็ปๆ็ฌฆ็ๆๅไธๆฎต
   307โ    result = [s.strip() for s in sentences if s.strip()]
   308โ    # ๆฃๆฅๆฏๅฆๆๅฉไฝๆๆฌ๏ผๆฒกๆ็ปๆ็ฌฆ็ๆฎต่ฝ๏ผ
   309โ    matched_len = sum(len(s) for s in sentences)
   310โ    if matched_len < len(text):
   311โ        remaining = text[matched_len:].strip()
   312โ        if remaining:
   313โ            result.append(remaining)
   314โ    return result

   317โdef result_to_markdown(result: dict, filename: str, diarize: bool = False) -> str:
   318โ    """ๅฐ่ฝฌๅฝ็ปๆ่ฝฌๆขไธบ Markdown ๆ ผๅผ"""
   319โ    md_lines = []
   320โ
   321โ    # ๆ ้ข๏ผไธๅธฆ่ฝฌๅฝๆถ้ด๏ผ
   322โ    md_lines.append(f"# ่ฝฌๅฝ๏ผ{filename}\n")
   323โ    md_lines.append("## ่ฝฌๅฝๅๅฎน\n")
   324โ
   325โ    # ๅค็ๅฅๅญไฟกๆฏ๏ผ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆปๆจกๅผ๏ผ
   326โ    if 'sentence_info' in result and result['sentence_info']:
   327โ        segments = result['sentence_info']
   328โ
   329โ        # --- ๅๅนถ่ฟ็ปญ็ธๅ่ฏด่ฏไบบ็ๆฎต่ฝ ---
   330โ        merged_segments = []
   331โ        current = None
   332โ        # ้ป่ฎคๆๅคงๅๅนถๆถ้ฟ 30 ็ง
   333โ        max_merge_ms = 30000
   334โ
   335โ        for seg in segments:
   336โ            start_ms = seg.get('start', 0)
   337โ            text = seg.get('sentence', seg.get('text', ''))
   338โ            spk = seg.get('spk') if diarize else None
   339โ
   340โ            if current is None:
   341โ                current = {
   342โ                    'start': start_ms,
   343โ                    'spk': spk,
   344โ                    'texts': [text],
   345โ                }
   346โ            else:
   347โ                # ๆฃๆฅๆฏๅฆๅฏไปฅๅๅนถ๏ผ็ธๅ่ฏด่ฏไบบไธๆถ้ฟไธ่ถ่ฟ้ๅถ
   348โ                if spk == current.get('spk'):
   349โ                    if start_ms - current['start'] <= max_merge_ms:
   350โ                        # ๅๅนถๅฐๅฝๅๆฎต่ฝ
   351โ                        current['texts'].append(text)
   352โ                    else:
   353โ                        # ่ถ่ฟๆถ้ฟ้ๅถ๏ผ่พๅบๅฝๅๆฎต่ฝๅนถๅผๅงๆฐๆฎต่ฝ
   354โ                        merged_segments.append(current)
   355โ                        current = {
   356โ                            'start': start_ms,
   357โ                            'spk': spk,
   358โ                            'texts': [text],
   359โ                        }
   360โ                else:
   361โ                    # ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅๆข๏ผ่พๅบๅฝๅๆฎต่ฝๅนถๅผๅงๆฐๆฎต่ฝ
   362โ                    merged_segments.append(current)
   363โ                    current = {
   364โ                        'start': start_ms,
   365โ                        'spk': spk,
   366โ                        'texts': [text],
   367โ                    }
   368โ
   369โ        # ่พๅบๆๅไธไธชๆฎต่ฝ
   370โ        if current is not None:
   371โ            merged_segments.append(current)
   372โ
   373โ        # ่ง่ๅ่ฏด่ฏไบบ ID๏ผไป 1 ๅผๅง่ฟ็ปญ็ผๅท๏ผ
   374โ        spk_map = {}
   375โ        next_label = 1
   376โ        for seg in merged_segments:
   377โ            spk = seg.get('spk')
   378โ            if spk is not None and spk not in spk_map:
   379โ                spk_map[spk] = next_label
   380โ                next_label += 1
   381โ
   382โ        # ่พๅบๅๅนถๅ็ๆฎต่ฝ
   383โ        for seg in merged_segments:
   384โ            start_ts = format_timestamp(int(seg['start']))
   385โ            combined_text = ' '.join(seg['texts'])
   386โ            spk = seg.get('spk')
   387โ
   388โ            if spk is not None:
   389โ                # ๆ่ฏด่ฏไบบไฟกๆฏ
   390โ                if isinstance(spk, str) and spk.startswith('speaker_'):
   391โ                    speaker_num = int(spk.split('_')[1]) + 1
   392โ                    speaker = f"ๅ่จไบบ{speaker_num}"
   393โ                else:
   394โ                    # ไฝฟ็จๆ ๅฐๅ็็ผๅท๏ผๆฏๆๆดๆฐ็ฑปๅ็ spk๏ผ
   395โ                    speaker = f"ๅ่จไบบ{spk_map.get(spk, 1)}"
   396โ                md_lines.append(f"{speaker} {start_ts}\n")
   397โ            else:
   398โ                # ๆ ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆปๆถ๏ผๅชๆพ็คบๆถ้ดๆณ
   399โ                md_lines.append(f"{start_ts}\n")
   400โ
   401โ            md_lines.append(f"{combined_text}\n\n")
   402โ
   403โ    # ๅค็ timestamp ๅญๆฎต๏ผๆ ๅๆจกๅผ๏ผๆ ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผ
   404โ    elif 'timestamp' in result and result['timestamp'] and 'text' in result:
   405โ        text = result['text']
   406โ        timestamps = result['timestamp']
   407โ
   408โ        # ๆๅฅๅญๅๅฒๆๆฌ
   409โ        sentences = split_text_by_sentences(text)
   410โ
   411โ        if not sentences:
   412โ            # ๆ ๆณๅๅฒๆถ๏ผ่พๅบๆดๆฎต
   413โ            md_lines.append(f"ๅ่จไบบ1 00:00\n")
   414โ            md_lines.append(f"{text}\n\n")
   415โ        else:
   416โ            # ่ฎก็ฎๆฏไธชๅฅๅญ็ๅญ็ฌฆ่ๅด
   417โ            char_idx = 0
   418โ            sentence_ranges = []
   419โ            for sent in sentences:
   420โ                # ่ฎก็ฎๅฅๅญๅจๅๆไธญ็ไฝ็ฝฎ๏ผ่่ๅฏ่ฝ็็ฉบๆ ผๅทฎๅผ๏ผ
   421โ                sent_clean = sent.replace(' ', '')
   422โ                text_from_idx = text.replace(' ', '')[char_idx:char_idx + len(sent_clean)]
   423โ
   424โ                start_char = char_idx
   425โ                end_char = char_idx + len(sent_clean)
   426โ                sentence_ranges.append((sent, start_char, end_char))
   427โ                char_idx = end_char
   428โ
   429โ            # ไธบๆฏไธชๅฅๅญๅ้ๆถ้ดๆณ
   430โ            # timestamp ๅ่กจไธญๆฏไธชๅ็ด ๅฏนๅบไธไธช้ณ้ข็ๆฎต [start_ms, end_ms]
   431โ            # ๆไปฌ้่ฆไผฐ็ฎๆฏไธชๅฅๅญๅฏนๅบๅคๅฐไธช timestamp
   432โ            total_chars = len(text.replace(' ', ''))
   433โ            total_timestamps = len(timestamps)
   434โ
   435โ            for sent, start_char, end_char in sentence_ranges:
   436โ                # ๆ นๆฎๅญ็ฌฆไฝ็ฝฎๆฏไพ่ฎก็ฎๆถ้ดๆณ็ดขๅผ
   437โ                start_ts_idx = int(start_char / total_chars * total_timestamps)
   438โ                end_ts_idx = min(int(end_char / total_chars * total_timestamps), total_timestamps - 1)
   439โ
   440โ                # ่ทๅ่ฏฅๅฅๅญ็่ตทๅงๆถ้ด
   441โ                if start_ts_idx < len(timestamps):
   442โ                    start_ms = timestamps[start_ts_idx][0]
   443โ                else:
   444โ                    start_ms = timestamps[-1][0] if timestamps else 0
   445โ
   446โ                start_ts = format_timestamp(int(start_ms))
   447โ                md_lines.append(f"ๅ่จไบบ1 {start_ts}\n")
   448โ                md_lines.append(f"{sent}\n\n")
   449โ
   450โ    else:
   451โ        # ๅๅบ๏ผ็ฎๅๆๆฌ่พๅบ - ๆทปๅ ้ป่ฎค่ฏด่ฏไบบๆ ็ญพๅๆถ้ดๆณ
   452โ        text = result.get('text', '')
   453โ        # ๅณไฝฟไธๅฏ็จ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผไนๆพ็คบ"ๅ่จไบบ1"ไปฅไฟๆๆ ผๅผไธ่ด
   454โ        md_lines.append(f"ๅ่จไบบ1 00:00\n")
   455โ        md_lines.append(f"{text}\n\n")
   456โ
   457โ    return '\n'.join(md_lines)

   460โ# ่ฏทๆฑๆจกๅ
   461โclass TranscribeRequest(BaseModel):
   462โ    file_path: str
   463โ    output_path: Optional[str] = None

   517โ@app.post("/transcribe", response_model=TranscribeResponse)
   518โasync def transcribe(request: TranscribeRequest):
   519โ    """
   520โ    ่ฝฌๅฝ้ณ้ข/่ง้ขๆไปถ
   521โ
   522โ    ่ฏทๆฑๅๆฐ:
   523โ        - file_path: ๆไปถ่ทฏๅพ๏ผๅฟ้๏ผ
   524โ        - output_path: ่พๅบ Markdown ๆไปถ่ทฏๅพ๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ
   525โ        - diarize: ๆฏๅฆๅฏ็จ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎค false๏ผ
   526โ        - model_id: ๆๅฎไฝฟ็จ็ๆจกๅ ID๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎคไฝฟ็จ Paraformer๏ผ
   527โ
   528โ    ่ฟๅ:
   529โ        - success: ๆฏๅฆๆๅ
   530โ        - output_path: ่พๅบๆไปถ่ทฏๅพ
   531โ        - text: ่ฝฌๅฝ็็บฏๆๆฌ
   532โ        - sentence_count: ๅฅๅญๆฐ้

   534โ    """
   535โ    try:

   537โ        update_activity()

   539โ        # ๆฃๆฅๆไปถๆฏๅฆๅญๅจ
   540โ        if not os.path.exists(request.file_path):
   541โ            raise HTTPException(
   542โ                status_code=400,
   543โ                detail=f"ๆไปถไธๅญๅจ: {request.file_path}"
   544โ            )
   545โ
   546โ        # ๆฃๆฅๆไปถๆ ผๅผ
   547โ        ext = Path(request.file_path).suffix.lower()
   548โ        if ext not in SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS:

   560โ        current_model = init_model(with_speaker=request.diarize, model_id=request.model_id)

   568โ
   569โ        # ๅค็็ปๆ
   570โ        if isinstance(result, list) and len(result) > 0:

   572โ
   573โ        # ่ฝฌๆขไธบ Markdown
   574โ        filename = Path(request.file_path).name
   575โ        markdown_content = result_to_markdown(result, filename, request.diarize)
   576โ
   577โ        # ไฟๅญๆไปถ

   579โ            f.write(markdown_content)
   580โ
   581โ        print(f"่ฝฌๅฝๅฎๆ๏ผๅทฒไฟๅญๅฐ: {output_path}")
   582โ
   583โ        return TranscribeResponse(

   591โ    except HTTPException:

   599โ@app.post("/batch_transcribe", response_model=BatchTranscribeResponse)
   600โasync def batch_transcribe(request: BatchTranscribeRequest):
   601โ    """
   602โ    ๆน้่ฝฌๅฝ็ฎๅฝไธญ็ๆไปถ
   603โ
   604โ    ่ฏทๆฑๅๆฐ:
   605โ        - directory: ็ฎๅฝ่ทฏๅพ๏ผๅฟ้๏ผ
   606โ        - output_dir: ่พๅบ็ฎๅฝ๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎคๅ็ฎๅฝ๏ผ
   607โ        - diarize: ๆฏๅฆๅฏ็จ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎค false๏ผ
   608โ        - model_id: ๆๅฎไฝฟ็จ็ๆจกๅ ID๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎคไฝฟ็จ Paraformer๏ผ
   609โ    """
   610โ    try:
   611โ        # ๆดๆฐๆดปๅจๆถ้ด
   612โ        update_activity()
   613โ
   614โ        # ๆฃๆฅ็ฎๅฝๆฏๅฆๅญๅจ
   615โ        if not os.path.isdir(request.directory):
   616โ            raise HTTPException(
   617โ                status_code=400,
   618โ                detail=f"็ฎๅฝไธๅญๅจ: {request.directory}"
   619โ            )
   620โ
   621โ        output_dir = request.output_dir or request.directory
   622โ
   623โ        # ๆฅๆพๆๆๆฏๆ็ๆไปถ
   624โ        files = []
   625โ        for ext in SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS:
   626โ            files.extend(Path(request.directory).glob(f'*{ext}'))
   627โ            files.extend(Path(request.directory).glob(f'*{ext.upper()}'))
   628โ
   629โ        if not files:
   630โ            raise HTTPException(
   631โ                status_code=400,
   632โ                detail="็ฎๅฝไธญๆฒกๆๆพๅฐๆฏๆ็ๅชไฝๆไปถ"
   633โ            )
   634โ
   635โ        results = []
   636โ        # ๆฏๆๆๅฎๆจกๅ ID
   637โ        current_model = init_model(with_speaker=request.diarize, model_id=request.model_id)
   638โ
   639โ        for file_path in files:
   640โ            try:
   641โ                print(f"ๆญฃๅจ่ฝฌๅฝ: {file_path}")
   642โ                result = current_model.generate(input=str(file_path), cache={})
   643โ
   644โ                if isinstance(result, list) and len(result) > 0:
   645โ                    result = result[0]
   646โ
   647โ                output_path = Path(output_dir) / f"{file_path.stem}.md"
   648โ                markdown_content = result_to_markdown(result, file_path.name, request.diarize)
   649โ
   650โ                with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   651โ                    f.write(markdown_content)
   652โ
   653โ                results.append({

   658โ            except Exception as e:

   661โ                    "success": False,

   663โ                })
   664โ
   665โ        return BatchTranscribeResponse(

   668โ            results=results
   669โ        )
   670โ
   671โ    except HTTPException:
   672โ        raise
   673โ    except Exception as e:
   674โ        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))

   677โdef start_idle_monitor():
   678โ    """ๅฏๅจ็ฉบ้ฒ็ๆง็บฟ็จ"""
   679โ    global MONITOR_THREAD

   681โ    MONITOR_THREAD.start()
   682โ    print(f"๐ ็ฉบ้ฒ็ๆงๅทฒๅฏๅจ๏ผ{IDLE_TIMEOUT // 60}ๅ้ๅ่ชๅจๅณ้ญ๏ผ")
   683โ
   684โ
   685โdef main():
   686โ    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='FunASR ่ฝฌๅฝๆๅก (FastAPI)')
   687โ    parser.add_argument('--port', type=int, default=8765, help='ๆๅก็ซฏๅฃ๏ผ้ป่ฎค 8765๏ผ')
   688โ    parser.add_argument('--host', type=str, default='127.0.0.1', help='็ๅฌๅฐๅ๏ผ้ป่ฎค 127.0.0.1๏ผ')
   689โ    parser.add_argument('--idle-timeout', type=int, default=600, help='็ฉบ้ฒ่ถๆถๆถ้ด๏ผๅไฝ็ง๏ผ้ป่ฎค 600็ง=10ๅ้๏ผ')
   690โ    parser.add_argument('--preload', action='store_true', help='้ขๅ ่ฝฝๆจกๅ')
   691โ    args = parser.parse_args()
   692โ
   693โ    # ่ฎพ็ฝฎ็ฉบ้ฒ่ถๆถ
   694โ    global IDLE_TIMEOUT
   695โ    IDLE_TIMEOUT = args.idle_timeout

   697โ    if args.preload:

   702โ
   703โ    print(f"๐๏ธ FunASR ่ฝฌๅฝๆๅกๅฏๅจไธญ...")
   704โ    print(f"๐ ๅฐๅ: http://{args.host}:{args.port}")
   705โ    print(f"๐ API ๆๆกฃ: http://{args.host}:{args.port}/docs")
   706โ    print(f"๐ ็ฉบ้ฒ็ๆง: {IDLE_TIMEOUT // 60}ๅ้่ชๅจๅณ้ญ")
   707โ    print(f"๐ API ็ซฏ็น:")
   708โ    print(f"   POST /transcribe      - ่ฝฌๅฝๅไธชๆไปถ")
   709โ    print(f"   POST /batch_transcribe - ๆน้่ฝฌๅฝ")
   710โ    print(f"   GET  /health          - ๅฅๅบทๆฃๆฅ\n")
   711โ
   712โ    # ๅฏผๅฅ uvicorn๏ผๅปถ่ฟๅฏผๅฅไปฅๅ ๅฟซๅฏๅจ้ๅบฆ๏ผ
   713โ    import uvicorn
   714โ    uvicorn.run(app, host=args.host, port=args.port, log_level="info")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- encoding: utf-8 -*-

def check_dependencies():
    """ๆฃๆฅไพ่ตๆฏๅฆๅฎ่ฃ"""
    errors = []

    try:
        import fastapi
    except ImportError:
        errors.append("FastAPI")

    try:
        import funasr
    except ImportError:
        errors.append("FunASR")

    try:
        import torch
    except ImportError:
        errors.append("PyTorch")

    return errors


def get_model_cache_dir():
    """่ทๅ ModelScope ๆจกๅ็ผๅญ็ฎๅฝ"""
    cache_dir = os.environ.get('MODELSCOPE_CACHE', os.path.expanduser('~/.cache/modelscope/hub'))
    return Path(cache_dir) / "models"


def check_model_exists(model_id: str) -> bool:
    """ๆฃๆฅๆจกๅๆฏๅฆๅทฒไธ่ฝฝ"""
    cache_dir = get_model_cache_dir()
    model_path = cache_dir / model_id.replace('/', os.sep)
    return model_path.exists() and any(model_path.iterdir())


def check_models():
    """ๆฃๆฅๆจกๅๆฏๅฆๅทฒไธ่ฝฝ"""
    if not MODELS_CONFIG.exists():
        return ["ๆจกๅ้็ฝฎๆไปถไธๅญๅจ"]

    with open(MODELS_CONFIG, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        config = json.load(f)

    missing = []
    for model in config.get('models', []):
        if model.get('required', True):
            if not check_model_exists(model['id']):
                missing.append(model.get('name', model['id']))

    return missing


def startup_check():
    """ๅฏๅจๅๆฃๆฅ"""
    print("๐ ๅฏๅจๅๆฃๆฅ...")

    # ๆฃๆฅไพ่ต
    missing_deps = check_dependencies()
    if missing_deps:
        print(f"\nโ ็ผบๅฐไพ่ต: {', '.join(missing_deps)}")
        print(f"\n่ฏทๅ่ฟ่กๅฎ่ฃ่ๆฌ:")
        print(f"  python {SKILL_DIR / 'scripts' / 'setup.py'}")
        return False

    # ๆฃๆฅๆจกๅ
    missing_models = check_models()
    if missing_models:
        print(f"\nโ ็ผบๅฐๆจกๅ: {', '.join(missing_models)}")
        print(f"\n่ฏทๅ่ฟ่กๅฎ่ฃ่ๆฌไธ่ฝฝๆจกๅ:")
        print(f"  python {SKILL_DIR / 'scripts' / 'setup.py'}")
        return False

    print("โ ๆฃๆฅ้่ฟ\n")
    return True


def update_activity():
    """ๆดๆฐๆๅๆดปๅจๆถ้ด"""
    global LAST_ACTIVITY_TIME
    LAST_ACTIVITY_TIME = time.time()


def get_idle_time() -> int:
    """่ทๅๅฝๅ็ฉบ้ฒๆถ้ด๏ผ็ง๏ผ"""
    return int(time.time() - LAST_ACTIVITY_TIME)


def should_shutdown() -> bool:
    """ๆฃๆฅๆฏๅฆๅบ่ฏฅๅณ้ญๆๅก"""
    idle_time = get_idle_time()
    return idle_time > IDLE_TIMEOUT


def shutdown_service():
    """ๅณ้ญๆๅก"""
    global SERVICE_RUNNING
    print(f"\n๐ ๆๅก็ฉบ้ฒ่ถ่ฟ {IDLE_TIMEOUT // 60} ๅ้๏ผ่ชๅจๅณ้ญ")
    SERVICE_RUNNING = False
    os.kill(SERVICE_PID, signal.SIGTERM)


def monitor_idle():
    """็ๆงๆๅก็ฉบ้ฒ็ถๆ็ๅๅฐ็บฟ็จ"""
    global SERVICE_RUNNING

    while SERVICE_RUNNING:
        time.sleep(30)  # ๆฏ30็งๆฃๆฅไธๆฌก

        # ๆฃๆฅๆฏๅฆๆๆดปๅจ
        if get_idle_time() < 30:  # 30็งๅๆๆดปๅจ
            continue

        # ๆฃๆฅๆฏๅฆๅบ่ฏฅๅณ้ญ
        if should_shutdown():
            print(f"โฐ ๆๅก็ฉบ้ฒๆฃๆต: {get_idle_time()} ็ง๏ผ่ชๅจๅณ้ญๆๅก")
            shutdown_service()
            break


def signal_handler(signum, frame):
    """ไฟกๅทๅค็ๅจ"""
    global SERVICE_RUNNING
    print(f"\nๆถๅฐไฟกๅท {signum}๏ผๆญฃๅจๅณ้ญๆๅก...")
    SERVICE_RUNNING = False
    sys.exit(0)


# ๆณจๅไฟกๅทๅค็ๅจ
signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, signal_handler)
signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, signal_handler)

# ๆฃๆฅ้่ฟๅๅๅฏผๅฅ
if not startup_check():
    sys.exit(1)

def get_model_type(model_id: str) -> str:
    """ๅคๆญๆจกๅ็ฑปๅ๏ผpipeline ๆ e2e"""
    if model_id.startswith("FunAudioLLM/fun-asr"):
        return "e2e"
    return "pipeline"


def init_model(with_speaker: bool = False, model_id: str = None):
    """ๅๅงๅ ASR ๆจกๅ

    Args:
        with_speaker: ๆฏๅฆๅฏ็จ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป
        model_id: ๆๅฎๆจกๅ ID๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎคไฝฟ็จ DEFAULT_MODEL๏ผ

    Returns:
        FunASR ๆจกๅๅฎไพ
    """
    global model, model_with_spk, MODEL_CACHE

    # ไฝฟ็จๆๅฎๆจกๅๆ้ป่ฎคๆจกๅ
    use_model_id = model_id or DEFAULT_MODEL
    model_type = get_model_type(use_model_id)

    # ๆๅปบ็ผๅญ้ฎๅผ
    cache_key = f"{use_model_id}_spk{with_speaker}"

    # ๆฃๆฅ็ผๅญ
    if cache_key in MODEL_CACHE:
        return MODEL_CACHE[cache_key]

    print(f"ๆญฃๅจๅ ่ฝฝ ASR ๆจกๅ: {use_model_id}")
    print(f"ๆจกๅ็ฑปๅ: {'็ซฏๅฐ็ซฏ (E2E)' if model_type == 'e2e' else 'ๆตๆฐด็บฟ (Pipeline)'}")

    if model_type == "e2e":
        # ็ซฏๅฐ็ซฏๆจกๅ๏ผFun-ASR-Nano๏ผ
        if with_speaker:
            # E2E ๆจกๅๆไธๆฏๆ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผ้็บงๅค็
            print("โ ๏ธ ็ซฏๅฐ็ซฏๆจกๅไธๆฏๆ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผๅทฒ็ฆ็จ")
            with_speaker = False

        # E2E ๆจกๅ๏ผๅฆ Nano๏ผๅๅงๅๅๆฐ
        model_kwargs = {
            "model": use_model_id,
            "disable_update": True,
            "disable_log": False,
            "trust_remote_code": True,  # Nano ๆจกๅ้่ฆๆญคๅๆฐ
        }

        # ไธบ Nano ๆจกๅๆทปๅ  VAD ๆจกๅไปฅๆ้ซๅ็กฎๆง
        if "nano" in use_model_id.lower():
            model_kwargs["vad_model"] = "fsmn-vad"
            model_kwargs["vad_kwargs"] = {"max_single_segment_time": 30000}

        model_instance = AutoModel(**model_kwargs)
        print(f"ๆจกๅๅ ่ฝฝๅฎๆ: {use_model_id}")
    else:
        # ไผ ็ปๆตๆฐด็บฟๆจกๅ
        if with_speaker:
            model_instance = AutoModel(
                model=use_model_id,
                vad_model="iic/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
                punc_model="iic/punc_ct-transformer_zh-cn-common-vocab272727-pytorch",
                spk_model="cam++",
                disable_update=True,
                disable_log=False,
            )
            print(f"ๆจกๅๅ ่ฝฝๅฎๆ๏ผๅซ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผ")
        else:
            model_instance = AutoModel(
                model=use_model_id,
                vad_model="iic/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
                punc_model="iic/punc_ct-transformer_zh-cn-common-vocab272727-pytorch",
                disable_update=True,
                disable_log=False,
            )
            print("ๆจกๅๅ ่ฝฝๅฎๆ")

    # ็ผๅญๆจกๅๅฎไพ
    MODEL_CACHE[cache_key] = model_instance
    return model_instance


def format_timestamp(ms: int) -> str:
    """ๅฐๆฏซ็ง่ฝฌๆขไธบๆถ้ดๆณๆ ผๅผ

    ่งๅ๏ผ
    - ๅฆๆๆๅฐๆถ๏ผไฝฟ็จ HH:MM:SS ๆ ผๅผ
    - ๅฆๅไฝฟ็จ MM:SS ๆ ผๅผ๏ผๅ่ๆไปถไธญ็ๆ ผๅผ๏ผ
    """
    seconds = ms // 1000
    hours = seconds // 3600
    minutes = (seconds % 3600) // 60
    secs = seconds % 60

    if hours > 0:
        # ๆๅฐๆถๆถๆพ็คบ HH:MM:SS
        return f"{hours:02d}:{minutes:02d}:{secs:02d}"
    else:
        # ๅฆๅๆพ็คบ MM:SS
        return f"{minutes:02d}:{secs:02d}"


def split_text_by_sentences(text: str) -> list:
    """ๆๅฅๅญๅๅฒๆๆฌ๏ผไฟ็ๅ้็ฌฆ๏ผ"""
    import re
    # ๅน้ๅฅๅญ็ปๆ็ฌฆ๏ผใ๏ผ๏ผ๏ผไปฅๅๅฏ้็ๅผๅทๅ็ฉบๆ ผ
    # ๆ ผๅผ๏ผ้็ปๆ็ฌฆๅๅฎน + ็ปๆ็ฌฆ + ๅฏ้ๅผๅท + ๅฏ้็ฉบๆ ผ
    pattern = r'[^ใ๏ผ๏ผ\n]+[ใ๏ผ๏ผ][ใใ""\"]?\s*'
    sentences = re.findall(pattern, text)
    # ่ฟๆปค็ฉบๅญ็ฌฆไธฒๅนถๆธ็็ฉบ็ฝ๏ผๅๆถๅค็ๆฒกๆ็ปๆ็ฌฆ็ๆๅไธๆฎต
    result = [s.strip() for s in sentences if s.strip()]
    # ๆฃๆฅๆฏๅฆๆๅฉไฝๆๆฌ๏ผๆฒกๆ็ปๆ็ฌฆ็ๆฎต่ฝ๏ผ
    matched_len = sum(len(s) for s in sentences)
    if matched_len < len(text):
        remaining = text[matched_len:].strip()
        if remaining:
            result.append(remaining)
    return result


def result_to_markdown(result: dict, filename: str, diarize: bool = False) -> str:
    """ๅฐ่ฝฌๅฝ็ปๆ่ฝฌๆขไธบ Markdown ๆ ผๅผ"""
    md_lines = []

    # ๆ ้ข๏ผไธๅธฆ่ฝฌๅฝๆถ้ด๏ผ
    md_lines.append(f"# ่ฝฌๅฝ๏ผ{filename}\n")
    md_lines.append("## ่ฝฌๅฝๅๅฎน\n")

    # ๅค็ๅฅๅญไฟกๆฏ๏ผ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆปๆจกๅผ๏ผ
    if 'sentence_info' in result and result['sentence_info']:
        segments = result['sentence_info']

        # --- ๅๅนถ่ฟ็ปญ็ธๅ่ฏด่ฏไบบ็ๆฎต่ฝ ---
        merged_segments = []
        current = None
        # ้ป่ฎคๆๅคงๅๅนถๆถ้ฟ 30 ็ง
        max_merge_ms = 30000

        for seg in segments:
            start_ms = seg.get('start', 0)
            text = seg.get('sentence', seg.get('text', ''))
            spk = seg.get('spk') if diarize else None

            if current is None:
                current = {
                    'start': start_ms,
                    'spk': spk,
                    'texts': [text],
                }
            else:
                # ๆฃๆฅๆฏๅฆๅฏไปฅๅๅนถ๏ผ็ธๅ่ฏด่ฏไบบไธๆถ้ฟไธ่ถ่ฟ้ๅถ
                if spk == current.get('spk'):
                    if start_ms - current['start'] <= max_merge_ms:
                        # ๅๅนถๅฐๅฝๅๆฎต่ฝ
                        current['texts'].append(text)
                    else:
                        # ่ถ่ฟๆถ้ฟ้ๅถ๏ผ่พๅบๅฝๅๆฎต่ฝๅนถๅผๅงๆฐๆฎต่ฝ
                        merged_segments.append(current)
                        current = {
                            'start': start_ms,
                            'spk': spk,
                            'texts': [text],
                        }
                else:
                    # ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅๆข๏ผ่พๅบๅฝๅๆฎต่ฝๅนถๅผๅงๆฐๆฎต่ฝ
                    merged_segments.append(current)
                    current = {
                        'start': start_ms,
                        'spk': spk,
                        'texts': [text],
                    }

        # ่พๅบๆๅไธไธชๆฎต่ฝ
        if current is not None:
            merged_segments.append(current)

        # ่ง่ๅ่ฏด่ฏไบบ ID๏ผไป 1 ๅผๅง่ฟ็ปญ็ผๅท๏ผ
        spk_map = {}
        next_label = 1
        for seg in merged_segments:
            spk = seg.get('spk')
            if spk is not None and spk not in spk_map:
                spk_map[spk] = next_label
                next_label += 1

        # ่พๅบๅๅนถๅ็ๆฎต่ฝ
        for seg in merged_segments:
            start_ts = format_timestamp(int(seg['start']))
            combined_text = ' '.join(seg['texts'])
            spk = seg.get('spk')

            if spk is not None:
                # ๆ่ฏด่ฏไบบไฟกๆฏ
                if isinstance(spk, str) and spk.startswith('speaker_'):
                    speaker_num = int(spk.split('_')[1]) + 1
                    speaker = f"ๅ่จไบบ{speaker_num}"
                else:
                    # ไฝฟ็จๆ ๅฐๅ็็ผๅท๏ผๆฏๆๆดๆฐ็ฑปๅ็ spk๏ผ
                    speaker = f"ๅ่จไบบ{spk_map.get(spk, 1)}"
                md_lines.append(f"{speaker} {start_ts}\n")
            else:
                # ๆ ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆปๆถ๏ผๅชๆพ็คบๆถ้ดๆณ
                md_lines.append(f"{start_ts}\n")

            md_lines.append(f"{combined_text}\n\n")

    # ๅค็ timestamp ๅญๆฎต๏ผๆ ๅๆจกๅผ๏ผๆ ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผ
    elif 'timestamp' in result and result['timestamp'] and 'text' in result:
        text = result['text']
        timestamps = result['timestamp']

        # ๆๅฅๅญๅๅฒๆๆฌ
        sentences = split_text_by_sentences(text)

        if not sentences:
            # ๆ ๆณๅๅฒๆถ๏ผ่พๅบๆดๆฎต
            md_lines.append(f"ๅ่จไบบ1 00:00\n")
            md_lines.append(f"{text}\n\n")
        else:
            # ่ฎก็ฎๆฏไธชๅฅๅญ็ๅญ็ฌฆ่ๅด
            char_idx = 0
            sentence_ranges = []
            for sent in sentences:
                # ่ฎก็ฎๅฅๅญๅจๅๆไธญ็ไฝ็ฝฎ๏ผ่่ๅฏ่ฝ็็ฉบๆ ผๅทฎๅผ๏ผ
                sent_clean = sent.replace(' ', '')
                text_from_idx = text.replace(' ', '')[char_idx:char_idx + len(sent_clean)]

                start_char = char_idx
                end_char = char_idx + len(sent_clean)
                sentence_ranges.append((sent, start_char, end_char))
                char_idx = end_char

            # ไธบๆฏไธชๅฅๅญๅ้ๆถ้ดๆณ
            # timestamp ๅ่กจไธญๆฏไธชๅ็ด ๅฏนๅบไธไธช้ณ้ข็ๆฎต [start_ms, end_ms]
            # ๆไปฌ้่ฆไผฐ็ฎๆฏไธชๅฅๅญๅฏนๅบๅคๅฐไธช timestamp
            total_chars = len(text.replace(' ', ''))
            total_timestamps = len(timestamps)

            for sent, start_char, end_char in sentence_ranges:
                # ๆ นๆฎๅญ็ฌฆไฝ็ฝฎๆฏไพ่ฎก็ฎๆถ้ดๆณ็ดขๅผ
                start_ts_idx = int(start_char / total_chars * total_timestamps)
                end_ts_idx = min(int(end_char / total_chars * total_timestamps), total_timestamps - 1)

                # ่ทๅ่ฏฅๅฅๅญ็่ตทๅงๆถ้ด
                if start_ts_idx < len(timestamps):
                    start_ms = timestamps[start_ts_idx][0]
                else:
                    start_ms = timestamps[-1][0] if timestamps else 0

                start_ts = format_timestamp(int(start_ms))
                md_lines.append(f"ๅ่จไบบ1 {start_ts}\n")
                md_lines.append(f"{sent}\n\n")

    else:
        # ๅๅบ๏ผ็ฎๅๆๆฌ่พๅบ - ๆทปๅ ้ป่ฎค่ฏด่ฏไบบๆ ็ญพๅๆถ้ดๆณ
        text = result.get('text', '')
        # ๅณไฝฟไธๅฏ็จ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผไนๆพ็คบ"ๅ่จไบบ1"ไปฅไฟๆๆ ผๅผไธ่ด
        md_lines.append(f"ๅ่จไบบ1 00:00\n")
        md_lines.append(f"{text}\n\n")

    return '\n'.join(md_lines)

@app.post("/transcribe", response_model=TranscribeResponse)
async def transcribe(request: TranscribeRequest):
    """
    ่ฝฌๅฝ้ณ้ข/่ง้ขๆไปถ

    ่ฏทๆฑๅๆฐ:
        - file_path: ๆไปถ่ทฏๅพ๏ผๅฟ้๏ผ
        - output_path: ่พๅบ Markdown ๆไปถ่ทฏๅพ๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ
        - diarize: ๆฏๅฆๅฏ็จ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎค false๏ผ
        - model_id: ๆๅฎไฝฟ็จ็ๆจกๅ ID๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎคไฝฟ็จ Paraformer๏ผ

    ่ฟๅ:
        - success: ๆฏๅฆๆๅ
        - output_path: ่พๅบๆไปถ่ทฏๅพ
        - text: ่ฝฌๅฝ็็บฏๆๆฌ
        - sentence_count: ๅฅๅญๆฐ้
        - error: ้่ฏฏไฟกๆฏ๏ผๅฆๆๆ๏ผ
    """
    try:
        # ๆดๆฐๆดปๅจๆถ้ด
        update_activity()

        # ๆฃๆฅๆไปถๆฏๅฆๅญๅจ
        if not os.path.exists(request.file_path):
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=400,
                detail=f"ๆไปถไธๅญๅจ: {request.file_path}"
            )

        # ๆฃๆฅๆไปถๆ ผๅผ
        ext = Path(request.file_path).suffix.lower()
        if ext not in SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS:
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=400,
                detail=f"ไธๆฏๆ็ๆไปถๆ ผๅผ: {ext}๏ผๆฏๆ็ๆ ผๅผ: {', '.join(SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS)}"
            )

        # ้ป่ฎค่พๅบ่ทฏๅพ
        output_path = request.output_path
        if not output_path:
            output_path = str(Path(request.file_path).with_suffix('.md'))

        # ่ทๅๆจกๅ๏ผๆฏๆๆๅฎๆจกๅ ID๏ผ
        current_model = init_model(with_speaker=request.diarize, model_id=request.model_id)

        print(f"ๆญฃๅจ่ฝฌๅฝ: {request.file_path}")
        if request.model_id:
            print(f"ไฝฟ็จๆจกๅ: {request.model_id}")

        # ๆง่ก่ฝฌๅฝ
        result = current_model.generate(input=request.file_path, cache={})

        # ๅค็็ปๆ
        if isinstance(result, list) and len(result) > 0:
            result = result[0]

        # ่ฝฌๆขไธบ Markdown
        filename = Path(request.file_path).name
        markdown_content = result_to_markdown(result, filename, request.diarize)

        # ไฟๅญๆไปถ
        with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(markdown_content)

        print(f"่ฝฌๅฝๅฎๆ๏ผๅทฒไฟๅญๅฐ: {output_path}")

        return TranscribeResponse(
            success=True,
            output_path=output_path,
            text=result.get('text', ''),
            timestamp=result.get('timestamp', None),
            sentence_count=len(result.get('sentence_info', [])) if 'sentence_info' in result else 0
        )

    except HTTPException:
        raise
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))


@app.post("/batch_transcribe", response_model=BatchTranscribeResponse)
async def batch_transcribe(request: BatchTranscribeRequest):
    """
    ๆน้่ฝฌๅฝ็ฎๅฝไธญ็ๆไปถ

    ่ฏทๆฑๅๆฐ:
        - directory: ็ฎๅฝ่ทฏๅพ๏ผๅฟ้๏ผ
        - output_dir: ่พๅบ็ฎๅฝ๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎคๅ็ฎๅฝ๏ผ
        - diarize: ๆฏๅฆๅฏ็จ่ฏด่ฏไบบๅ็ฆป๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎค false๏ผ
        - model_id: ๆๅฎไฝฟ็จ็ๆจกๅ ID๏ผๅฏ้๏ผ้ป่ฎคไฝฟ็จ Paraformer๏ผ
    """
    try:
        # ๆดๆฐๆดปๅจๆถ้ด
        update_activity()

        # ๆฃๆฅ็ฎๅฝๆฏๅฆๅญๅจ
        if not os.path.isdir(request.directory):
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=400,
                detail=f"็ฎๅฝไธๅญๅจ: {request.directory}"
            )

        output_dir = request.output_dir or request.directory

        # ๆฅๆพๆๆๆฏๆ็ๆไปถ
        files = []
        for ext in SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS:
            files.extend(Path(request.directory).glob(f'*{ext}'))
            files.extend(Path(request.directory).glob(f'*{ext.upper()}'))

        if not files:
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=400,
                detail="็ฎๅฝไธญๆฒกๆๆพๅฐๆฏๆ็ๅชไฝๆไปถ"
            )

        results = []
        # ๆฏๆๆๅฎๆจกๅ ID
        current_model = init_model(with_speaker=request.diarize, model_id=request.model_id)

        for file_path in files:
            try:
                print(f"ๆญฃๅจ่ฝฌๅฝ: {file_path}")
                result = current_model.generate(input=str(file_path), cache={})

                if isinstance(result, list) and len(result) > 0:
                    result = result[0]

                output_path = Path(output_dir) / f"{file_path.stem}.md"
                markdown_content = result_to_markdown(result, file_path.name, request.diarize)

                with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                    f.write(markdown_content)

                results.append({
                    "file": str(file_path),
                    "output": str(output_path),
                    "success": True
                })
            except Exception as e:
                results.append({
                    "file": str(file_path),
                    "success": False,
                    "error": str(e)
                })

        return BatchTranscribeResponse(
            success=True,
            total=len(files),
            results=results
        )

    except HTTPException:
        raise
    except Exception as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='FunASR ่ฝฌๅฝๆๅก (FastAPI)')
    parser.add_argument('--port', type=int, default=8765, help='ๆๅก็ซฏๅฃ๏ผ้ป่ฎค 8765๏ผ')
    parser.add_argument('--host', type=str, default='127.0.0.1', help='็ๅฌๅฐๅ๏ผ้ป่ฎค 127.0.0.1๏ผ')
    parser.add_argument('--idle-timeout', type=int, default=600, help='็ฉบ้ฒ่ถๆถๆถ้ด๏ผๅไฝ็ง๏ผ้ป่ฎค 600็ง=10ๅ้๏ผ')
    parser.add_argument('--preload', action='store_true', help='้ขๅ ่ฝฝๆจกๅ')
    args = parser.parse_args()

    # ่ฎพ็ฝฎ็ฉบ้ฒ่ถๆถ
    global IDLE_TIMEOUT
    IDLE_TIMEOUT = args.idle_timeout

    if args.preload:
        init_model()

    # ๅฏๅจ็ฉบ้ฒ็ๆง
    start_idle_monitor()

    print(f"๐๏ธ FunASR ่ฝฌๅฝๆๅกๅฏๅจไธญ...")
    print(f"๐ ๅฐๅ: http://{args.host}:{args.port}")
    print(f"๐ API ๆๆกฃ: http://{args.host}:{args.port}/docs")
    print(f"๐ ็ฉบ้ฒ็ๆง: {IDLE_TIMEOUT // 60}ๅ้่ชๅจๅณ้ญ")
    print(f"๐ API ็ซฏ็น:")
    print(f"   POST /transcribe      - ่ฝฌๅฝๅไธชๆไปถ")
    print(f"   POST /batch_transcribe - ๆน้่ฝฌๅฝ")
    print(f"   GET  /health          - ๅฅๅบทๆฃๆฅ\n")

    # ๅฏผๅฅ uvicorn๏ผๅปถ่ฟๅฏผๅฅไปฅๅ ๅฟซๅฏๅจ้ๅบฆ๏ผ
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host=args.host, port=args.port, log_level="info")


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

import sys, os, threading, tkinter as tk

    def _pick_audio(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='้ๆฉๅฝ้ณๆไปถ',
            filetypes=[('้ณ้ขๆไปถ', '*.wav *.mp3 *.m4a *.flac *.ogg *.wma *.aac'), ('ๆๆๆไปถ', '*.*')])
        if p: self.audio_path.set(p)

    def _pick_doc(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='้ๆฉWordๆๆกฃ',
            filetypes=[('Wordๆๆกฃ', '*.docx'), ('ๆๆๆไปถ', '*.*')])
        if p: self.doc_path.set(p)

    def _start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path.get() or not self.doc_path.get():
            messagebox.showwarning('ๆ็คบ', '่ฏทๅ้ๆฉๅฝ้ณๅWordๆๆกฃ')
            return
        config = load_config()
        if not is_valid(config):
            messagebox.showwarning('ๆ็คบ', '่ฏทๅๅจ่ฎพ็ฝฎไธญ้็ฝฎAPIๅฏ้ฅ')
            self.nb.select(2)
            return
        self.start_btn.config(state='disabled')
        self.progress.start(10)
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, args=(config,), daemon=True).start()

    def _do_compare(self, config):
        try:
            def cb(msg): self.status_var.set(msg)

            cb(f'ๆญฃๅจ่ฝฌๅๅฝ้ณ ({ASR_PROVIDERS[config["asr_provider"]]["name"]})...')
            audio_text = transcribe_audio(self.audio_path.get(), config, cb)

            cb('ๆญฃๅจ่งฃๆๆๆกฃ...')
            paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path.get())
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            cb(f'ๆญฃๅจๅฏนๆฏๅๅฎน ({LLM_PROVIDERS[config["llm_provider"]]["name"]})...')
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config)

            cb('ๆญฃๅจ็ๆๅฏนๆฏๆๆกฃ...')
            output_path = generate_diff_docx(self.doc_path.get(), result.get('diffs', []))

            self.after(0, lambda: self._show_result(output_path, result, audio_text, doc_text))
        except Exception as e:
            self.after(0, lambda: messagebox.showerror('ๅค็ๅคฑ่ดฅ', str(e)))
        finally:
            self.after(0, self._reset_home)

    def _reset_home(self):
        self.progress.stop()
        self.start_btn.config(state='normal')
        self.status_var.set('ๅฐฑ็ปช')

    # ===== Result Tab =====
    def _build_result_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=16)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  ็ปๆ  ')
        self.result_frame = f

        self.diff_count_var = tk.StringVar(value='ๅฐๆชๅฏนๆฏ')
        self.summary_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.output_path_var = tk.StringVar()

        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.diff_count_var, font=('', 14, 'bold'), foreground='#e53935').pack(pady=(0,8))
        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.summary_var, wraplength=600, foreground='#666').pack(pady=(0,12))

        pw = ttk.PanedWindow(f, orient='horizontal')
        pw.pack(fill='both', expand=True)

        lf = ttk.LabelFrame(pw, text='ๅฝ้ณ่ฝฌๅ')
        self.audio_text_box = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(lf, wrap='word', width=35, height=18, font=('', 10))
        self.audio_text_box.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=4, pady=4)
        pw.add(lf, weight=1)

        rf = ttk.LabelFrame(pw, text='ๆๆกฃๅๆ')
        self.doc_text_box = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(rf, wrap='word', width=35, height=18, font=('', 10))
        self.doc_text_box.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=4, pady=4)
        pw.add(rf, weight=1)

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(f)
        btn_f.pack(pady=12)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆๅผๅฏนๆฏๆๆกฃ', command=self._open_result).pack(side='left', padx=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆๅผๆๅจๆไปถๅคน', command=self._open_result_folder).pack(side='left', padx=4)

    def _show_result(self, output_path, result, audio_text, doc_text):
        diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
        self.diff_count_var.set(f'ๅ็ฐ {len(diffs)} ๅคๅทฎๅผ')
        self.summary_var.set(result.get('summary', ''))
        self.output_path_var.set(output_path)

        self.audio_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
        self.audio_text_box.insert('1.0', audio_text)
        self.doc_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
        self.doc_text_box.insert('1.0', doc_text)

        self.nb.select(1)

    def _open_result(self):
        p = self.output_path_var.get()
        if p and os.path.exists(p):
            os.startfile(p)

    def _open_result_folder(self):
        p = self.output_path_var.get()
        if p and os.path.exists(p):
            os.startfile(os.path.dirname(p))

    # ===== Settings Tab =====
    def _build_settings_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=12)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  ่ฎพ็ฝฎ  ')

        canvas = tk.Canvas(f, bg='#f5f5f5', highlightthickness=0)
        scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(f, orient='vertical', command=canvas.yview)
        self.settings_inner = ttk.Frame(canvas)
        self.settings_inner.bind('<Configure>', lambda e: canvas.configure(scrollregion=canvas.bbox('all')))
        canvas.create_window((0, 0), window=self.settings_inner, anchor='nw')
        canvas.configure(yscrollcommand=scrollbar.set)
        canvas.pack(side='left', fill='both', expand=True)
        scrollbar.pack(side='right', fill='y')
        # Mouse wheel scroll
        canvas.bind_all('<MouseWheel>', lambda e: canvas.yview_scroll(-1*(e.delta//120), 'units'))

        sf = self.settings_inner
        self.config_data = load_config()
        self.asr_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data['asr_provider'])
        self.llm_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data['llm_provider'])
        self.key_entries = {}

        # ASR section
        ttk.Label(sf, text='่ฏญ้ณ่ฝฌๅๆๅก', font=('', 14, 'bold')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(8,4))
        asr_f = ttk.Frame(sf)
        asr_f.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        for pid, info in ASR_PROVIDERS.items():
            ttk.Radiobutton(asr_f, text=info['name'], variable=self.asr_var, value=pid,
                command=self._on_asr_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        self.asr_keys_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(sf, text='่ฝฌๅๆๅก้็ฝฎ', padding=8)
        self.asr_keys_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        self._render_asr_keys()

        # LLM section
        ttk.Label(sf, text='ๅคงๆจกๅ๏ผ่ฏญไนๅฏนๆฏ๏ผ', font=('', 14, 'bold')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(16,4))

        ttk.Label(sf, text='ๅฝๅ', font=('', 11)).pack(anchor='w')
        llm_cn = ttk.Frame(sf)
        llm_cn.pack(fill='x', pady=2)
        for pid, info in LLM_PROVIDERS.items():
            if info['region'] == 'cn':
                ttk.Radiobutton(llm_cn, text=info['name'], variable=self.llm_var, value=pid,
                    command=self._on_llm_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        ttk.Label(sf, text='ๅฝ้', font=('', 11)).pack(anchor='w')
        llm_intl = ttk.Frame(sf)
        llm_intl.pack(fill='x', pady=2)
        for pid, info in LLM_PROVIDERS.items():
            if info['region'] == 'intl':
                ttk.Radiobutton(llm_intl, text=info['name'], variable=self.llm_var, value=pid,
                    command=self._on_llm_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        self.llm_keys_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(sf, text='ๅคงๆจกๅ้็ฝฎ', padding=8)
        self.llm_keys_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        self._render_llm_keys()

        ttk.Button(sf, text='ไฟๅญๆๆ่ฎพ็ฝฎ', command=self._save_settings).pack(pady=16)

    def _render_asr_keys(self):
        for w in self.asr_keys_frame.winfo_children(): w.destroy()
        pid = self.asr_var.get()
        info = ASR_PROVIDERS[pid]
        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})

        for field in info['fields']:
            label_map = {'key': 'API Key / AccessKey ID', 'secret': 'Secret', 'appKey': 'AppKey', 'region': 'Region'}
            ttk.Label(self.asr_keys_frame, text=label_map.get(field, field)).pack(anchor='w')
            e = ttk.Entry(self.asr_keys_frame, width=50, show='*' if field in ('key','secret') else '')
            e.insert(0, keys.get(field, ''))
            e.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
            self.key_entries[f'asr_{pid}_{field}'] = e

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.asr_keys_frame)
        btn_f.pack(pady=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆต่ฏ่ฟๆฅ', command=self._test_asr).pack()

    def _render_llm_keys(self):
        for w in self.llm_keys_frame.winfo_children(): w.destroy()
        pid = self.llm_var.get()
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS[pid]
        keys = self.config_data.get('llm_keys', {}).get(pid, {})

        ttk.Label(self.llm_keys_frame, text='API Key').pack(anchor='w')
        e = ttk.Entry(self.llm_keys_frame, width=50, show='*')
        e.insert(0, keys.get('key', ''))
        e.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
        self.key_entries[f'llm_{pid}_key'] = e

        ttk.Label(self.llm_keys_frame, text=f'ๆจกๅๅ็งฐ๏ผ็็ฉบ็จ้ป่ฎค: {info["default_model"]}๏ผ').pack(anchor='w')
        em = ttk.Entry(self.llm_keys_frame, width=50)
        em.insert(0, keys.get('model', ''))
        em.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
        self.key_entries[f'llm_{pid}_model'] = em

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.llm_keys_frame)
        btn_f.pack(pady=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='ๆต่ฏ่ฟๆฅ', command=self._test_llm).pack()

    def _on_asr_change(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self._render_asr_keys()

    def _on_llm_change(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self._render_llm_keys()

    def _collect_keys(self):
        """Collect current key entries into config_data before switching provider."""
        for k, e in list(self.key_entries.items()):
            try:
                val = e.get()
            except:
                continue
            parts = k.split('_', 2)  # e.g. asr_aliyun_key or llm_zhipu_key
            if parts[0] == 'asr':
                pid, field = parts[1], parts[2]
                self.config_data.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(pid, {})[field] = val
            elif parts[0] == 'llm':
                pid, field = parts[1], parts[2]
                self.config_data.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(pid, {})[field] = val
        self.key_entries.clear()

    def _test_asr(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        pid = self.asr_var.get()
        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
        ok, msg = test_asr(pid, keys)
        messagebox.showinfo('ๆๅ' if ok else 'ๅคฑ่ดฅ', msg)

    def _test_llm(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        pid = self.llm_var.get()
        keys = self.config_data.get('llm_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
        if not keys.get('key'):
            messagebox.showwarning('ๆ็คบ', '่ฏทๅๅกซๅAPI Key')
            return

        def do():
            ok, msg = test_llm(pid, keys.get('key'), keys.get('model'))
            self.after(0, lambda: messagebox.showinfo('ๆๅ' if ok else 'ๅคฑ่ดฅ', msg))

        threading.Thread(target=do, daemon=True).start()

    def _save_settings(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self.config_data['asr_provider'] = self.asr_var.get()
        self.config_data['llm_provider'] = self.llm_var.get()
        save_config(self.config_data)
        messagebox.showinfo('ๆๅ', '่ฎพ็ฝฎๅทฒไฟๅญ')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app = App()
    app.mainloop()
